NW Hurghada, Red Sea

Hurghada · Red Sea · Egypt

Where turquoise water
meets golden sand

An innovative, contemporary hotel brand on a private stretch of Red Sea coastline. Six pools, an aqua park, and seven beautifully appointed room categories.

Established 1994 · Red Sea
Scroll to explore
30+
Years of
Hospitality
Welcome to Golden Beach

An extraordinary vision, three decades in the making.

The Golden Beach is an innovative, contemporary hotel brand, offering an ultimate vacation concept on Hurghada's Red Sea coast. Whether beach resort, lifestyle retreat, or family playground — we are constantly redefining what a Red Sea holiday can be.

Tucked into the northwest curve of Hurghada, we sit ten kilometres from El Gouna, fifteen from the city centre, and twenty from Hurghada International Airport. Close enough to explore, far enough to feel away.

A warm welcome from our family to yours. The Golden Beach Family
Private Beach 6 Heated Pools Aqua Park 7 Restaurants 8 Bars Diving Centre Spa & Wellness Kids' Club Live Entertainment Private Beach 6 Heated Pools Aqua Park 7 Restaurants 8 Bars Diving Centre Spa & Wellness Kids' Club Live Entertainment
What sets us apart

Built for every kind of traveller

Family-friendly, couple-romantic, solo-restorative — all on the same shoreline.

Family Friendly

Connecting rooms, kids' clubs, and a heated aqua park designed for laughter.

Amazing Beach

Half a kilometre of soft white sand and crystal-clear shallows, just for guests.

6 Swimming Pools

Heated in winter, cooled in summer. Lap-lanes, kids' pools, and palm-shaded loungers.

Aqua Park

12 slides for adults and kids — small thrills for big and little adventurers.

Our Rooms

Seven categories. One quiet view.

Check out the variety of our room types — from a sea-view balcony at sunrise to a connected family suite with two bathrooms.

Our Private Beach
The Beach

Half a kilometre of soft, white sand.

Our shoreline curves gently into the Red Sea — calm, shallow, and warm enough to swim from March through November. Sunbeds, parasols, and beach service are complimentary, and our diving centre is steps away when the reef calls.

  • Beach serviceFrom 8am until sunset, every day
  • Snorkel & dive tripsTo the offshore Red Sea reefs
  • WatersportsKayaks, pedalos, paddleboards
  • Lifeguard on dutyDuring all daylight hours
Beach Activities
Restaurants & Bars
Dining

Seven kitchens. One shared table.

From our flagship Bouquet international buffet to charcoal-grilled Red Sea fish at the Beach Restaurant, every meal is unhurried. Bars stay open until late, and our themed evenings — Egyptian, Italian, Seafood — are quiet showstoppers.

  • The BouquetInternational buffet · Up to 600 seats
  • Don VitoItalian à la carte trattoria
  • Beach RestaurantRed Sea seafood & grills
  • Pool & Lobby BarsCocktails, mocktails, shisha
Browse Menus

Virtual Tour

Step inside, before you arrive.

Take a guided walk through the resort — the pools, the beach, the rooms and the gardens — in a single, sweeping tour.

Guest Stories

What our guests say

3,000+Guest reviews
90%Recommend us
4.6★Average rating
★ ★ ★ ★ ★
"Very nice and clean hotel. The garden was amazing, food as well. Rooms were spacious and clean. Beach was nice and water was clean."
T
Tanja
Czech Republic · TripAdvisor
★ ★ ★ ★ ★
"Enjoyed our stay so much. Staff are friendly. Amenities are superb and well maintained. Huge area, many restaurants, rooms bigger than expected."
T
Traveller 19
Malaysia · TripAdvisor
★ ★ ★ ★ ★
"Absolute highlight is the Golden Beach — 200 metres flat, perfect for kids. Solid wood loungers, sun and wind protection, perfect service."
M
Marcus & Family
Germany · TripAdvisor
Latest News

From the resort

Seasonal events, fresh menus, and quiet little improvements around the gardens.

May 02, 2026 Offer

Summer Stay 7-for-5 — book by June

Book seven nights, pay for five. Available across all room categories for arrivals between 1 July and 31 August.

Apr 18, 2026 Event

Italian Night returns to the Beach Restaurant

Wood-fired pizza, hand-rolled pasta, and a four-course tasting menu — every Wednesday starting May 6th.

Apr 04, 2026 News

Reef restoration: our 2026 commitment

We've partnered with HEPCA to plant 1,200 coral fragments on the house reef this year. Read about how guests can join.

Stay in touch

Quiet news, quietly delivered.

One email a season. Seasonal offers, new menus, and reef updates. Unsubscribe with a single click.

An innovative, contemporary hotel brand on Hurghada's Red Sea coast. Family-owned, family-run, and quietly proud of it since 1994.
